name: beamhop
description: The beamhop monorepo — sandboxed builds and remote-shell primitives.

scripts.build: bun --filter @beamhop/shell-protocol build && bun --filter @beamhop/acp-protocol build && bun --filter './packages/*' build
scripts.typecheck: bun --filter @beamhop/shell-protocol build && bun --filter @beamhop/acp-protocol build && bun --filter './packages/*' typecheck
